arts.ttl: Why Chelsea vs Nottingham Forest is not on TV as Premier League rule blackout explained
arts.sum: Chelsea welcome Nottingham Forest to Stamford Bridge this afternoon, looking to remain in the Premier League top four places before the international break. Nuno Espirito Santo's men are 11th in the table on nine points after beating Southampton and Liverpool but suffered their first defeat of the season last week against Fulham.
